caveats: All 18 intended cells completed and passed the official final correctness grade.
The ranking uses only official final scores produced after each agent stopped and the final grader passed.
Intermediate sampled maxima are retained for audit but are not used in the published ranking because non-full-gate measurements are not comparable to the official final correctness grade.
Each model has one run per task, so run-to-run variance is unmeasured.
Provider implementations differ, so this is a model-plus-provider comparison through the same Jcode harness rather than a provider-neutral model comparison.
The 20-hour agent budget was a safety cap. Every agent stopped on its own judgment before the cap.

environment.prompt: identical published optimization prompt for every model and task

revisions.note: The 09:30 UTC snapshot read the Sol utf16-transcode scores.jsonl before Modal volume sync completed, recording an empty curve. This revision restores the synced 18-grade curve and its hash; final_score and the ranking are unchanged.
Finalized the three matched Claude Opus 4.8 cells after all agents stopped and all official final correctness grades passed.

score_semantics: score = log2(given_cost / optimized_cost); higher is better
